Package global.thalion.ttio.genomics

Class GenomicRun

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.genomics.GenomicRun
All Implemented Interfaces:
Indexable<AlignedRead>, Run, Streamable<AlignedRead>, AutoCloseable
public class GenomicRun extends Object implements Indexable<AlignedRead>, Streamable<AlignedRead>, Run, AutoCloseable
Lazy view over one /study/genomic_runs/<name>/ group.

Materialises AlignedRead objects on demand from the signal channels. The GenomicIndex is loaded eagerly at open time for cheap filtering and offset lookups; the heavy signal channels (sequences, qualities, plus 3 compounds) stay lazy.

Genomic analogue of AcquisitionRun.

API status: Stable (v0.11 M82.3).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOGenomicRun, Python ttio.genomic_run.GenomicRun.

      Description copied from interface: Run
      Run identifier as stored in the .tio file (e.g. "run_0001" or "genomic_0001").

      public int readCount()

    • readFrom

      public static GenomicRun readFrom(StorageGroup runGroup, String name)
      Open an existing genomic_runs/<name>/ group. The caller resolves the run group and passes it as runGroup.

    • signalChannelCompressionCode

      public int signalChannelCompressionCode(String channelName)
      M90.10: probe the @compression attribute on a signal_channels child dataset. Returns the codec id (an Enums.Compression ordinal), or 0 (NONE) when the attribute is absent or the channel doesn't exist. Used by TransportWriter to mirror the file's per-channel codec choice on the wire.

    • objectAtIndex

      public AlignedRead objectAtIndex(int i)
      Materialise read at index i. Indexable requires this signature. The shorthand readAt is provided as a domain-natural alias.
      Specified by:
      objectAtIndex in interface Indexable<AlignedRead>
      Returns:
      the element at index (0-based).

    • readAt

      public AlignedRead readAt(int i)
      Domain-natural alias for objectAtIndex(int).

    • readsInRegion

      public List<AlignedRead> readsInRegion(String chromosome, long start, long end)
      Reads on chromosome whose mapping position is in [start, end).

    • count

      public int count()
      Description copied from interface: Run
      Number of measurements in the run. Modality-specific: spectra for AcquisitionRun, aligned reads for GenomicRun.
      Specified by:
      count in interface Indexable<AlignedRead>
      Specified by:
      count in interface Run
      Returns:
      the total number of elements.

    • get

      public Object get(int index)
      Phase 1: modality-agnostic accessor required by Run. Delegates to objectAtIndex(int); the typed return is widened to Object so callers iterating uniformly over AcquisitionRun + GenomicRun see a single signature.
      Specified by:
      get in interface Run

    • provenanceChain

      public List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceChain()
      Phase 1 (post-M91): per-run provenance chain in insertion order. Closes the M91 read-side gap — until Phase 1 the lazy GenomicRun view didn't expose provenance, so cross- modality queries had to fall back to the @sample_name attribute. Returns an empty list for runs that carry no provenance.

      Source of record: the provenance_json attribute on the /study/genomic_runs/<name>/ group, written by SpectralDataset.writeGenomicRunSubtree(global.thalion.ttio.providers.StorageGroup, java.lang.String, global.thalion.ttio.genomics.WrittenGenomicRun) (Phase 1) — same on-disk pattern as AcquisitionRun.writeProvenance(global.thalion.ttio.providers.StorageGroup).

      Specified by:
      provenanceChain in interface Run

    • hasMore

      public boolean hasMore()
      Specified by:
      hasMore in interface Streamable<AlignedRead>
      Returns:
      true if Streamable.nextObject() may be called.

      Returns:
